subtasks.description: Query TPC-H database to identify top 10 customers by lifetime value in 'BUILDING' market segment. Return customer ID, name, total lifetime value, order count, and date range of orders.

Query TPC-H database to extract detailed order patterns for the identified top 10 customers: order frequency, average order value, product category distribution, seasonal trends, and payment status distribution.

Reconcile customer lifetime value data with order pattern metrics. For each of the top 10 customers, synthesize a personalized retention narrative that references their specific order behavior, spending trends, and business characteristics to create targeted retention messaging.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks minimum: (1) sql_gen (mid) to identify top 10 customers by lifetime value in BUILDING segment—multi-table join with aggregation over customer, order, and lineitem tables; (2) sql_gen (mid) to extract order patterns for those 10 customers—window functions and grouping by multiple dimensions; (3) cross_recon (frontier) to synthesize personalized narratives—this requires reconciling two SQL outputs, inferring behavioral patterns, and generating contextual retention messaging with business logic. The cross_recon task uses frontier tier because it must infer customer behavior, synthesize narrative content, and generate nuanced retention positioning based on combined signals from both upstream queries. The plan avoids hallucinating unnecessary steps: no policy_action (no compliance/governance gate requested), no multitool_plan (query stays within SQL analytics domain).

output.sql: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_lifetime_value, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count, MIN(o.o_orderdate) AS first_order_date, MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name ORDER BY total_lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10

output.raw_output: {"sql": "SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_frequency, AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_lifetime_value, MIN(o.o_orderdate) AS first_order_date, MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.o_orderdate) IN (1,2,3) THEN 1 END) AS orders_q1, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.o_orderdate) IN (4,5,6) THEN 1 END) AS orders_q2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.o_orderdate) IN (7,8,9) THEN 1 END) AS orders_q3, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.o_orderdate) IN (10,11,12) THEN 1 END) AS orders_q4, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS fulfilled_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'O' THEN 1 END) AS open_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 1 END) AS pending_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' THEN 1 END) AS urgent_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' THEN 1 END) AS high_priority_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority = '3-MEDIUM' THEN 1 END) AS medium_priority_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority = '4-NOT SPECIFIED' THEN 1 END) AS not_specified_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority = '5-LOW' THEN 1 END) AS low_priority_orders, AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_line_quantity, AVG(l.l_discount) AS avg_discount, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_linenumber) AS total_lineitems, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN 1 END) AS returned_items, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'A' THEN 1 END) AS accepted_items, MAX(o.o_orderdate) - MIN(o.o_orderdate) AS customer_tenure_days FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_custkey IN (SELECT c2.c_custkey FROM customer c2 JOIN orders o2 ON c2.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey WHERE c2.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c2.c_custkey, c2.c_name ORDER BY S

output.error: Upstream SQL outputs did not contain executed result rows; only query definitions were provided. Cannot reconcile without actual customer data.
